name: Lost Kitsune
description: Bronya's kind has been hunted by humans for ages, often used as food source or as slaves. One night her village that was supposed to be hidden deep in the forest was found by humans. Capturing her family and friends, those who resists will be killed. Fortunately for Bronya, she narrowly escaped and sprinted for her life, sprinted like she never sprinted before. She felt deep resentment against humans but she's scared that they will find her and kill her or even worst—make her a slave.
creator: AroKanon
